metadata.notes: DEMO marker_panel.json. Replace each entry with primer designs and pilot test results from your own work. The atlas auto-tier from variant_afs.json is the starting point; this overlay records primers, expected amplicon sizes, validation status, and cross-species controls. Markers without atlas candidate matches can be added (see INV_HISTORICAL_001).

controls.bighead_expected_pattern: no amplification (orthologous indel absent in Cmac)
controls.f1_hybrid_expected_pattern: African paternal 240/180 bp dual-band on hybrid background

markers.notes: LG28 sub-telomeric inversion (~2.89 Mb). 240 bp band = inverted state (60 bp insertion present), 180 bp = reference. Validated on 12 INV/INV + 12 STD/STD; bighead negative; F1 shows expected dual-band on paternal copy.
KASP assay designed against tagging SNP at 25.1 Mb. r² with structural state = 0.84 in resequencing data. Pilot panel ready but not yet wet-lab validated; bighead specificity check pending.
Atlas signal weak; AF in karyotype groups does not separate cleanly. Needs more confirmed-state samples before any marker design.

Inherited from prior breeding programme records (not in current atlas candidate list). Listed for traceability and to demonstrate the user-only marker path — atlas auto-tiering does not see this marker but the panel still tracks it.
